The '''Night Blades''' were a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] made up of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] flying [[StealthX]] fighters, led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saba Sebatyne]]. This was one of the six squadrons which comprised the [[StealthX wing]] led by [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="Inferno 1">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>

During the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]], the Night Blades lost three pilots in an unsuccessful attack on the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Vulnerator]]'', representing around one-quarter of their combat strength.<ref name="Inferno 1" /> They had already lost one other pilot, [[Tahiri Veila]], when she deserted the Jedi before the battle.

When [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] arrived at [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] from [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], Master Skywalker initially assigned her to Tahiri's position in the Night Blades, but as she insisted on flying with him in the battle.<ref name="Inferno 1" />
